headline: Carrier First Quarter 2026 Earnings Advisory
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on Thursday, April 30, 2026 and host a conference call and webcast at 7:30 a.m. ET.
